title: Fix bridge SX1262 overlay TCXO properties for Zephyr binding
description: LoRa-enabled bridge builds using existing nRF52840 overlays fail during devicetree generation because the overlays use SX1262 TCXO properties not declared by the local semtech,sx1262 binding. Observed failures: boards/rak4631_nrf52840.overlay uses tcxo-power-gpios; boards/heltec_t114.overlay uses tcxo-wakeup-time. Reconcile the overlays and/or binding so LoRa-enabled bridge builds configure cleanly.
close_reason: Replaced obsolete SX1262 TCXO overlay properties with dio3-tcxo-voltage and tcxo-power-startup-delay-ms, verified all changed bridge overlays with LoRa-enabled nrf52840dk bridge builds
